posts.title: What Is Nail Fungus: Symptoms, Causes, and When to Treat It
posts.description: Fingernail fungus is rarer than toenail fungus but behaves differently in cause, appearance, and recovery time. Here is what you need to know before treating.

posts.title: What Is Nail Fungus: Symptoms, Causes, and When to Treat It
posts.description: Nail fungus clears in weeks but the nail takes months to grow back. Here is a realistic timeline by treatment type so you know exactly what to expect.

posts.title: What Is Nail Fungus: Symptoms, Causes, and When to Treat It
posts.description: Understanding nail fungus causes goes beyond warm showers and gym floors. Here is what actually drives infection and why some people are far more vulnerable.

posts.title: Home Remedies for Nail Fungus: What the Evidence Says
posts.description: A clear, evidence-graded look at home remedies for nail fungus, from tea tree oil to Vicks, with real cure rates and a timeline you can trust.

posts.title: What Is Nail Fungus: Symptoms, Causes, and When to Treat It
posts.description: Nail fungus prevention is more than keeping nails dry. Learn the recurrence triggers, shoe protocols, salon risks, and daily habits that actually keep it from returning.

posts.title: What Is Nail Fungus: Symptoms, Causes, and When to Treat It
posts.description: A clear, stage-by-stage guide to nail fungus symptoms, what they mean, and when discolouration or thickening means it is time to see a doctor.

posts.title: What Is Nail Fungus: Symptoms, Causes, and When to Treat It
posts.description: Understand nail fungus treatment options from OTC to oral medication. A clear comparison of what works, when to escalate, and realistic cure rates explained.

posts.title: What Is Nail Fungus: Symptoms, Causes, and When to Treat It
posts.description: Nail fungus affects one in ten adults and is frequently misidentified. This guide covers what it is, how to recognise it, and when to act.
